title: The Introduction of the Pay System ('ala') and of the Military Register (diwan
description: and of the Military Register (diwan)74e In this year `Umar assigned payments to the Muslims and established the [military) registers. He determined the payments accordtreasures can be found in the chapters of Muslim tradition dealing with the miraculous events expected to occur immediately before the Day of Judgment: "Earth will throw up oblong pieces of gold and silver, having the size of a column " (tagfu al-ard aflddha kabidihd amthdl al-usiuwdn min al-dhahab wa al-fiddahj.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 12
